description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a complex, multi-volume structure featuring a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray surfaces, with large glass windows and sections of exposed brickwork. The property includes a spacious green lawn, a paved driveway, and several mature trees, as well as a detached garage and a small outbuilding. The main entrance is accessible via a wide pathway leading up to the house, and there is a visible patio or terrace area for outdoor living. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, multi-volume bungalow with flat and sloped roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of white, gray, and brick finishes, set on a landscaped lot with trees and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, green lawn, and a detached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the patio area, mature trees, and additional outbuilding, with more of the backyard visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the complex rooflines, glass sections, and the relationship between the main house and the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, brickwork, and the overall massing of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
